target: 9. Paranoia
Mio, don't go.
Shin-chan...
I understand that you want to believe Alain. But I...
I don't want anyone near you unless I'm absolutely sure they're the real deal.
Go on ahead, Alain. Mio and I will follow later.
…I see.
I'm sorry...
It's fine, I don't mind if you doubt me. Just...
Make sure the two of you stay safe. Just promise me that.
Dad…
Yeah, I promise.
Alright, see you later.
Yeah…
You take care too, Alain.
I'm sorry, Mio. I just couldn't bring myself to believe that was the real Alain.
Even if what that Alain said was true, and there really was a burglar who broke into Kofune and a Shadow that attacked them...
I think it's unnatural that they would just ignore the Alain who was in the store and leave.
Besides, if he was looking for us, he should have just called either my smartphone or yours first.
I haven't had a single call from Alain. What about you, Mio?
I haven't... either.
...If there's even the slightest thing to be suspicious of, I have no intention of judging him to be the real deal.
If my judgment is wrong...
Yeah, in that case I'll apologize with everything I have. To everyone I ended up doubting.
If that's the case, let me just confirm something too.
You're not a Shadow, are you, Shin-chan...? That's not possible, right?
Me... a Shadow?
I'm sorry... I'm saying some terrible things, aren't I.
Even after you've helped me so much, and said such kind things to me.
But after being told that Dad might be a Shadow, I don't know what to believe anymore.
The Shin-chan in front of me right now is...
You're not a Shadow, right? I can trust you, right?
Yeah, you can trust me. I'm the real Shinpei Ajiro.
Yeah... I believe you. I'm sorry, Shin-chan.
You don't have to apologize. Come on, let's head to the harbor.
Yeah, let's go. I hope we can meet up with Tokiko and the others.
(I should organize my thoughts while we head to the harbor. I need to think about what to do in the worst-case scenario too.)
(I don't want to imagine it, but if I were to lose Sou, Tokiko, and even... Mio...)
(If that happens, I'll have no choice but to try "that".)
(I have no proof that I can really go back. But...)
(If I'm going to fall into the depths of despair without being able to protect a single thing, then "that" is my only option.)
(Well, if it comes to a situation where I've lost everyone, I'd probably be in a pretty dangerous situation myself.)
(...No matter what it takes, I will protect Mio to the end.)
Shin-chan? Are you thinking about something?
...Yeah. Just a bit about what we should do next.
I wonder if you ever think about me sometimes.
Huh? What?
N-Nothing! More importantly, let's hurry!
If we don't make it to the ferry in time, it'll all be for nothing!
H-Hey, wait a sec! Mio, you can't wander away from me!
